# [SN-02] BitNet b1.58 ternary MLP

> Plan ID `SN-02` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

✅ **Done on γ-surface.** Weights are stored in the
`{−1, 0, +1}` trit format (1.58 bpw); MAC primitive is XOR + popcount
(no `*` operator — R-SI-1 clean).

## Evidence in this repo

- RTL: `src/bitnet_encoder.v` (2-bit trit encoding),
  `src/vsa_matmul_8x8.v`, `src/vsa_matmul_16x16.v`,
  `src/gf16_popcount.v`, `src/gf16_popcount16.v`.
- Demo: [`BENCHMARKS.md`](../../BENCHMARKS.md) §Demo 1.
- Reference: BitNet b1.58 — [`arXiv:2402.17764`](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.17764).

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Weight density `log₂ 3 = 1.58 bpw` (encoding documented).
- [x] MAC primitive uses XOR + popcount (no `*` operator).
- [x] R-SI-1 audit gate green in CI.

## R5 honesty

The 5.04× INT8 compression and 10.1× FP16 compression numbers in
`BENCHMARKS.md` §Demo 1 are **format-level** comparisons, not
measured throughput. Throughput / TOPS-per-watt remains a SKY130A
pre-silicon estimate.
